name: example-percy-maestro
description: Example integration of Percy visual testing with the Maestro web testing framework

scripts.test-cors: bash -c 'python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory public >/tmp/cors-server.log 2>&1 & SRVPID=$!; sleep 2; percy-maestro exec -- maestro test flows/cors-iframe.yaml; RC=$?; kill $SRVPID 2>/dev/null; exit $RC'
scripts.test-all: yarn test-web && yarn test-auth && yarn test-regions && yarn test-coded-regions && yarn test-responsive && yarn test-scoped && yarn test-cases-labels && yarn test-cors
